node.statement: Step B (Stage 1 separation, Proposition P_1). Because t^l_{nm}(phi,theta,psi) = P^l_{nm}(cos theta) * exp(-i(n phi + m psi)), the triple sum factors: for each k, the (phi, psi) part is a 2-D DFT (Stage1-2DFFT). Computing all N slices costs O(N^3 log N), after which f-hat(l)_{mn} = <s_{nm}, P^l_{nm}> with s_{nm}[k] = F2[k,n,m] sin(theta_k) (paper line 1335).
